hidden_files.tests/test_hidden_join_aggregate.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path


def test_multiple_children_are_not_cross_multiplied():
    connection = sqlite3.connect(':memory:')
    connection.executescript(Path('schema.sql').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    connection.execute("INSERT INTO orders VALUES (1, 'acct')")
    connection.executemany('INSERT INTO fills VALUES (?, 1, ?)', [(1, 2), (2, 3)])
    connection.executemany('INSERT INTO fees VALUES (?, 1, ?)', [(1, 0.5), (2, 1.0)])
    row = connection.execute(Path('report.sql').read_text(encoding='utf-8')).fetchone()
    assert row == ('acct', 5, 1.5)
